productDisplayName: Provouge Men Black Classic Formal Shoe
description: Stylish tapering pointed toe loafers from provogue for men with a refined, stacked heel. Slim, sleek silhouetting with a diagonal stitch detail on the forefoot. Wear this with tonal, structured trousers and a crisp shirt and a blazer. Upper Genuine leather upper with reinforced overlay on the heel Slip on styling with elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for ease of wearability Soft sockliner for instep comfort Brand badge on the lateral side of the midfoot Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with a stacked heel Textured grooves on the forefoot for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
